title: sideritis hyssopifolia subsp. castellana
intro: Sideritis hyssopifolia subsp. castellana, also known as Spanish ironwort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the genus Sideritis. It is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory and gastrointestinal health, as well as possessing antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Sideritis hyssopifolia subsp. castellana is traditionally used to prepare teas, infusions, and other herbal remedies, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
